title: Single, ACA Premium Tax Credit (Form 8962)
description: Sole-proprietor consultant with marketplace coverage. AGI $55k, annual premium $9,000, SLCSP $8,400, advance APTC received $4,500. Engine computes net PTC reconciliation; balance flows to Form 8962. (Sub-gap: engine simplifies SLCSP-vs-actual computation.)
expectations: Excess APTC repayment OR additional PTC refund per Form 8962
